hypothesis: When trained solely on all pairwise Ar/O2, Ar/N2, and O2/N2 PBM datasets and using frozen single-gas networks as node encoders, a single GraphSAGE model will, without retraining, predict wafer-resolved etching-rate profiles for previously unseen ternary Ar/O2/N2 mixtures across 10–70 mTorr and 50–2000 W with R2 ≥ 0.90, exceeding a composition-augmented FNN baseline by ≥0.05 R2.
